ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., LED, photodiode, laser diode) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Peak Wavelength, Dominate Wavelength) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., nm, V) */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., electrical, optical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "test_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition (e.g., IF=20mA, V=0V;f=1MHz) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test condition */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Test environment (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being measured */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition under which the measurement was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "measurement_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control specialist, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the device */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the device version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being changed */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "audit_log_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit log (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "audit_log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the audit log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
